name: Bac Water
description: USP-grade sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol, which acts as a preservative to prevent microbial growth after the vial is opened. Required for reconstituting lyophilised (freeze-dried) peptide powders before use in research. The benzyl alcohol content allows the reconstituted solution to be stored at 2–8°C for up to 28 days without contamination.
shortDesc: USP-grade sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol, which acts as a preservative to prevent microbial growth after the vial is opened. Required for reconstituting lyophilised (freeze-dried) peptide powders before use in research.

faq.q: What is Bac Water used for in preclinical research?
faq.a: Bac Water is studied in the peer-reviewed literature across the pathways described in the research overview above. Velox Peptides supplies Bac Water strictly as a research reagent for in vitro use by qualified researchers. It is not a medicinal product and is not for human or veterinary consumption.
